name: Hammer Strike: Destruction Zone
description: Hammer Strike: Destruction Zone is an adrenaline-fueled destruction game offering constant battle against time. You must crush concrete, steel, and reinforced metal blocks raining endlessly from the sky with a massive industrial hammer. Drag the hammer anywhere on screen, charge power, and release to smash! Each destroyed block subtracts precious seconds from the time bar. But beware — the time bar constantly fills up and when its full, game over. Easy, Normal, and Hard modes offer different time speeds and block durabilities for every skill level. Precise timing, quick reflexes, and strategic hammer placement are keys to success.
instructions: Drag hammer tap to charge power and release to SMASH Destroy constantly falling blocks Each crushed block reduces time but the bar keeps filling Maximize destruction before time runs out Speed power survival
